narrative:
Brookfield Twp A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 902 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
